sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58715" key="kolpi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολπ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n58715.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">form into a bosom</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fold</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
